title: diplectraden leptoceras
side_effects: Diplectraden leptoceras can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory problems. In severe cases, excessive consumption or prolonged use can lead to liver damage, cardiovascular issues, and increased risk of bleeding disorders. Some people may also experience dizziness, headaches, and nausea when using the plant without proper guidance or dosage. Furthermore, improper use can also cause interactions with other medications, exacerbating existing health conditions or leading to unexpected complications.
